task.summary:
Update bean files: Chat.java, Message.java, Post.java,User.java;
Update sourcefiles: DataGenerator.java, infoResource.json, InformationResource.java(user data can be get from this file)
1.Add toMap function to User.java and Post.java to simplify the upload data function. 2.Data can get from json file but the app cannot run. 3.Problems are labeled with TODO
Add time information and update Post.java
Add friend list to User.java and setFriend method to UserDao.java
Fix likeButton bug and subButton bug
Fix sendPost function in guest mode
1.Add Search function to Search.java. 2.Modified the insert function in AVLTree.java and Node constructor.
1.Add Query.java to connect data with grammar.
1.Add tags to data 2.Change type of tag from String to List 3.Modify the AVLTree insert method.
1.Add tags to data 2.Change type of tag from String to List 3.Modify the AVLTree insert method. 4.Fix the addPost method.

1. Changed the type of AVLTree's node value from HashSet to List. 2. Completed the TagExp evaluate method(modified the interface of EXp). 3. Added getTagList method in PostDao. 4. Query method not complete yet.
Fix send post function in guest mode
1.Fix send post function in guest mode 2.Add rawData files, DataGenerator.java and InformationResource.java
Add comments for bean files and Dao files
Add comments for DataGenerator.java and InformationResource.java

MESSAGE.value: Fix likeButton bug and subButton bug
Fix sendPost function in guest mode
1.Add Search function to Search.java. 2.Modified the insert function in AVLTree.java and Node constructor.
1.Add Query.java to connect data with grammar.
1.Add tags to data 2.Change type of tag from String to List 3.Modify the AVLTree insert method.
1.Add tags to data 2.Change type of tag from String to List 3.Modify the AVLTree insert method. 4.Fix the addPost method.

1. Changed the type of AVLTree's node value from HashSet to List. 2. Completed the TagExp evaluate method(modified the interface of EXp). 3. Added getTagList method in PostDao. 4. Query method not complete yet.
Fix send post function in guest mode
1.Fix send post function in guest mode 2.Add rawData files, DataGenerator.java and InformationResource.java
Add comments for bean files and Dao files
Add comments for DataGenerator.java and InformationResource.java
